title: AMRAP Total Challenge
description: 10-minute AMRAP with walking lunges, push-ups and crunches for max rounds

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.instructions: Quick lateral shuffles, 3-4 steps each side

exercises.name: Walking lunges
exercises.instructions: Walk forward in continuous lunges, big steps

exercises.name: Hindu push-ups
exercises.instructions: Diving motion: dive down then arc back up

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift shoulders, brace the abs

exercises.name: Goblet squat (no weight)
exercises.instructions: Hands in front of the chest, sit deep

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Child's pose
exercises.instructions: Kneeling, arms extended forward, forehead on the floor, breathe deeply
